news.t: Rayliant and ChinaAMC Introduce the Rayliant-ChinaAMC Transformative China Tech ETF (Ticker: CNQQ) on NASDAQ

holdings.infoBox: CNQQ is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tencent Holdings stock at 8.28%, Alibaba Group Holding at 8.12%, Zhongji Innolight at 7.34%, Contemporary Amperex Technology at 6.18%, and Xiaomi at 3.01%.

overview.description: The Rayliant-ChinaAMC Transformative China Tech ETF (CNQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of China and Hong Kong companies in transformative technology sectors. The fund targets firms across six key industries driving Chinas next-generation technologies. CNQQ was launched on Sep 26, 2025 and is issued by ChinaAMC.
infoTable: Solactive ChinaAMC Transformative China Tech Index

data.title: Rayliant and ChinaAMC Introduce the Rayliant-ChinaAMC Transformative China Tech ETF (Ticker: CNQQ) on NASDAQ
data.text: LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Rayliant Investment Research today announced the launch of the Rayliant-ChinaAMC Transformative China Tech ETF (NASDAQ: CNQQ).
